new_fixes_this_run.change: NEW RULE ADDED to graduated_rules.json gate=20 (PROBE MODE). 85-90% confidence penalize -5pts.

new_fixes_this_run.expected_impact: Counteracts overconfidence entry sizing in the worst-performing confidence bin.
